characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: The protagonist for KiddyGiRL-AND.An ES candidate trainee who normally works as a waitress in the Touch&Go Cafe of the GTO building.A energetic and positive ditz, but her talents in combat assure her status as a potential ES-member. Her partner is the comparatively tempered Q-Feuille. Action Girl: Out of the lead duo, she is more likely be in direct combat. Alliterative Name: Her birth name isLieseLotte. Catchphrase:"Pokkyun~!" Charm Point: Refers to the small rose-shaped mark on her thigh as one.

characters.name: Other GTO Staff
characters.description: The GTO Director and Eclipse's successor. Cannot Spit It Out: When caught making out with Sommer. Theme Naming: French for Winter - goes well with her assistant. Director Hiver's assistant and resident smooth talker. Also acts as her guard. The Charmer: Quite good at projecting the impression thatnothingodd is happening, unlike his boss. He alsoperfectly bluffshis way out when caught making out with his boss. Without even breaking a sweat.

characters.name: ES Members
characters.description: Fangirl: ofCard Getter Sakura, just like Q-Feuille.

characters.name: G Society
characters.description: Dark and Troubled Past. He was sent away, to a research laboratory to be experimented on by his and Ascoeur’s parents. And according, to Geacht’er (the people in charge of the research laboratory), gave him pain and despair. Luke, I Am Your Father:He is Alfried, Ascoeur's older brother.
